title: MC Finals
description: THE official modpack used on the MC Finals server
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2431b65a42aa4104d00941800623f8381b0420a4.jpeg)

**THE official modpack used on the MC Finals server!**

**INFO:** This pack aims to maintain the original Minecraft experience while also providing optimization and quality of life features. The pack has a base of the best optimization mods available, while adding some quality of life features and some flair ✨

You can use this pack to play on the official MC Finals minecraft server, or you can use it for your personal worlds.

![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/391bbeaa4e376dd9743a07007b6b2d209a47f769.webp)

HOW TO INSTALL:

- Download the Modrinth app
- Search for MC Finals and click install
- Run the instance, check your settings / keybinds and have fun!

![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/391bbeaa4e376dd9743a07007b6b2d209a47f769.webp)

If you're having issues with the modpack, feel free to ask for support in our Discord server and we'll try to help out! Also join if you have any feedback you want to share - all is welcome.

Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/wNTcPyq7Pq) server here!

![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/391bbeaa4e376dd9743a07007b6b2d209a47f769.webp)

Rules:

If you play on the MC Finals server with this modpack, the following rules apply:

- You can choose to apply the optional resource packs.
- You can change keybinds to your liking.
